Flex Plan - The Path Forward

March 25, 2026

Table of contents

At My Funded Futures, we create a clear pathway from evaluations, simulated funding, and to live capital — aligning trader performance with integrity to drive consistent, scalable success. Our mission is to unlock opportunity for disciplined traders while building durable, long-term value.

We are delighted to introduce you to the Flex Plan! Please refer to the details provided below for all relevant information surrounding...

- Evaluation Stage

- Simulated Funding Stage

- Payout Policy

- Transition to Live

- Live Parameters

As your Sim Funded accounts starts at $0, your account may go into Negative Balance, until the Max Loss Limit trails up to $0 or above. 

- The Flex Plan Payout Policy and Withdrawal Limit

To ensure solid capital standing and a safety net for transitioning to live funding stages, there are limitations on withdrawals. 

Qualification for Payouts

5 winning days of $150 

Withdrawal Limit

Minimum of $250 

Maximum of 50% of total profits up to $5k

Maximum Loss Limit (MLL)

After first payout, MLL moves to $100 and remains static. 

Profit Split

80/20

--- The Net Profit required between each payout is $500

How Payouts Work

- After five winning days (each with Net PNL ≥ $150), you become eligible for a payout request.

- You may request 50% of your net profits per payout, up to $5,000.

- The other 50% of profits must remain in your account.

- Standard 80/20 profit split applies (80% trader / 20% firm).

- Minimum payout request: $250.

- After the first payout, the Maximum Loss Limit resets to $100.

- Traders must achieve a net profit of $500 between each payout

Payout Example #1

- Trader records 5 qualifying winning days, netting $5,000 total profit.

- Eligible payout: $2,500 (50%).

- After profit split, trader receives $2,000.

- Remaining $2,500 stays as balance.

New payout cycle now restarts and trader must achieve a net profit of at least $500 and 5 individual winning days of $150 to qualify for new payout request. 

Payout Example #2

- Trader records 5 qualifying winning days, netting $20,000 total profit. 

- Eligible payout capped at $5,000

- After profit split, trader receives $4,000.

- Remaining $15,000 stays as balance. 

New payout cycle now restarts and trader must achieve a net profit of at least $500 and 5 individual winning days of $150 to qualify for new payout request. 

Payout Example #3 - Big Loss Prevents Payout

- Trader records 5 qualifying winning days but has a negative profit balance due to an initial big loss. 

- Day 1: Loss of -$1,000

- Days 2-6: Five winning days of +$150 each

- Total net profit since last payout: -$250

- Eligible Payout: Not eligible for payout. (net profit needs to be at least +$500)

Despite having 5 individual days of $150, the trader does not meet the $500 net profit requirement and has negative overall profit since the last payout. No payout request can be made. Trader must continue trading to recover losses and achieve at least $500 net profit before qualifying for the next payout request. 

The Flex Plan aims to provide a solid foundation for your trading career. Below are the achievable targets for a trader to transition to a live account, marking a significant milestone in your trading journey. 

- Transition to Live

Your transition to a live account has never been clearer. Traders will advance to the ultimate goal of trading in a live environment with even greater freedom. Please see below for the parameters regarding your move to a live account.

Traders transition to a live account after reaching one of the following:

- Achieving five (5) consecutive payouts on the same account (Traders can achieve this target on as many as 3 accounts)

- Reaching the total sim cap of $100k

- Consistent performance in sim funded account (Discretion of the Risk Management Team) 

Live account Parameters will be as follows: 

- Initial balance of $2,000 per account

- Minimum Balance of $156

- No Daily Loss Limit (DLL)

- Drawdown Type - (EOD) End of Day

- Minimum Payout of $250

- Max Contracts - 4 mini / 40 micros

Live Post-Breach Cooldown Period Protocol

Following Live account closure due to Maximum Loss breach:

- 21-Day Cooldown Period initiation:

- All Sim Funded account trading is prohibited.

- New Evaluation purchases, account resets, or additional account acquisitions are prohibited.

​Post-Cooldown (21 calendar days):

- Cooldown restrictions are lifted.

- You can continue from your active Sim Funded account (if applicable) and/or purchase new Evaluations or accounts, unless communicated otherwise by the team. 

Ready to get funded? Start here.

Frequently Asked Question:

Q. Are there any consistency rules in the evaluation?

A. Yes, there is a 50% in the evaluation, the Flex Plan evaluation can be passed in as little as 2 days. 

Q. Is scaling rule present in the Flex Plan?

A. Scaling rules are not present in the evaluation stage. However, the following applies to the sim-funded phase of the Flex Plan: 

- $0 - $1,499 - 2 mini / 20 micro

- $1,500-$1,999 - 3 mini / 30 micro

- $2,000 and up - 5 mini / 50 micro 

Q. Is there a Daily Loss Limit (DLL) on this account?

A. No, there is no daily loss limit on the Flex Plan. 

Q. Are there any buffer zones in the Flex Account payout policy?

A. No, there isn't any buffer zone on the New Flex Account. You will be able to take withdrawals after reaching 5 winning days of $150.

Q. Are there any activation fees on the Flex Plan?

A. Our new Flex Plan does not have an activation fee.

Q. What's the minimum payout amount I can request on the Flex Plan? 

A. The minimum payout on the Flex Plan is $250.

Q. Can I trade on live and sim at the same time? 

A. No, once you have a live account, you cannot trade on the sim and live environment simultaneously. 

If you have any more questions, please contact our customer support team to know more about our program.
